comment: BRAIN M4 — madenlenmiş üretim yasaları (kaynak: mamilas-brain-intelligence-mined memory + eski hat kazısı). TEK KANON: hem src/core/agentProtocol.ts hem scripts/mamilas-command.mjs bu dosyadan okur; ayna kopya YOK. Maddeler evrensel kilit değildir — Mami direktifi overrideKeys'ten birini anarsa madde suppressed listesine düşer ve kaynağıyla görünür kalır.

universal.text: Detail triad: the frame carries one environmental-pressure detail on a body or surface, one micro-action or physiological event, and one concrete optical event of light or material behaviour (never a mood adjective).

Self-contained: the prompt rebuilds the full continuity state (wardrobe wear, accumulated dust or weather, identity clause, environment) from zero — the engine has no memory of a previous scene and the prompt never says "as before".
The prompt closes as a clean motion-ready still, half a second before one concrete named physical event.

Empty quality tokens appear without source backing: 4K, 8K, masterpiece, ultra-detailed, premium, cinematic, stunning, beautiful, polished, award-winning — replace with a concrete lens, film-stock, grain or cadence fact.
The palette is written as a closed hue/color list instead of a saturation/contrast/bias regime — closed lists collapse to duotone in the engine.

animation.text: 2D-medium law: the prompt states WHICH surfaces carry flat-cel treatment (the figure) versus which surfaces are painted or photoreal (the background) — the gap between them IS the style; a franchise or brand name never substitutes for this physical split.
The world is invoked by a style adjective or franchise name instead of physical material facts (ink line, painted cel, brushed clay) — names do not fix plasticity; materials do.

photoreal.text: Photoreal counter-terms are present against the engine's plastic-commercial default: negative fill, motivated light, subtle 35mm film grain, raw skin micro-texture (or equivalents earned by this shot).

nano_banana_2.text: Camera grammar comes early and numeric: a numeric lens and f-stop (e.g. "locked 40mm at seated eye level, f/8 deep focus") — never a vague "cinematic lens".
